title: は (wa) — Topic particle
explanation: は marks the topic of the sentence (pronounced 'wa', not 'ha'). It tells the listener what we are talking about.
example_en: As for me, I am a student.

title: を (wo) — Object particle
explanation: を marks the direct object of a verb. It is pronounced 'o'.

title: です — to be (polite)
explanation: です is the polite copula. Attach to nouns or i-adjectives to make polite statements.

title: ます-form
explanation: The polite present/future verb form. Replace る with ます for ru-verbs.

title: て-form
explanation: Connects clauses, makes requests, expresses ongoing actions.

title: 〜ている (ongoing)
explanation: て-form + いる expresses an ongoing action or resulting state.

title: 〜たい (want to)
explanation: Replace ます with たい to express desire.
example_en: I want to go to Japan.

title: から (because)
explanation: から after a clause gives a reason.
example: 暑いから、水を飲みます。
example_en: Because it's hot, I drink water.

title: 〜なければなりません
example: 勉強しなければなりません。

title: 〜ようと思う
example: 日本に住もうと思います。
example_en: I'm thinking of living in Japan.

title: 〜にちがいない
example: 彼は来るにちがいない。

title: 〜ざるをえない
example_en: I have no choice but to admit it.
